name: labelguard
description: Use-specific label quality qualification gate for autonomous-driving dataset candidates.

scripts.lint: node --check src/app.mjs && node --check src/domain.mjs && node --check src/assistant.mjs && node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/ai.mjs && node --check server/env.mjs && node --check scripts/live-llm-smoke.mjs && python3 -c "import ast,pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('scripts/generate-nuscenes-demo.py').read_text())"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
